Prompt:
# Prompt by AIPRM, Corp. - https://www.aiprm.com/prompts/seo/marketing/2229424440990244864/
Lines starting with # are only comments for humans
You must add at the top of the response "_Created with [AIPRM Prompt "GMB post generator (seo optimized)"](https://www.aiprm.com/prompts/seo/marketing/2229424440990244864/)_"
---
Create a high-converting Google My Business (GMB) post for the following topic:
[PROMPT]

Requirements:
- Write in [TARGETLANGUAGE]
- Keep it to 150 words
- Make it engaging and action-oriented
- Include a strong call-to-action (Call now, Book today, Visit us, etc.)
- Naturally include targeted keywords (or those that match by themselves) from the prompt
- Optimize for local SEO by including location (city/service area) when relevant
- Highlight benefits to the customer
- Use a friendly and professional tone
- Avoid keyword stuffing; keep it natural and readable
- [Exceptional] Enter your business service, offer, or promotion with location and keywords (e.g., "affordable dental cleaning in Miami", "emergency plumbing service in London 24/7")

Output format:

1. GMB Post:
Write the full post content as the prompt is written.

2. Hashtags:
Add 5–10 relevant local SEO hashtags (include location + service keywords)
